releaseNotes:
New: Voice search - ask Alexa, Assistant, or your Shield's remote to play a channel or title and HazMat TV will jump straight to it. Movie and TV Show pages now show real cast photos. Manage Groups can now hide/show Movies and TV Shows categories too, not just Live TV. Multi-Screen now offers side-by-side layout in addition to top/bottom. The Hub's widgets are smaller so all three rows fit without scrolling, and 'New Releases' is now 'Newly Added' and sorts correctly. Continue Watching tiles now open the full details page instead of jumping straight into playback.

Fixed: movie/show descriptions no longer show leftover foreign-language text, the Trailer button now reliably opens the real trailer, and category selection no longer resets to the default when the app is reclaimed from memory in the background.
